name: Tomatoe-Cheese Calzones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sun-dried tomatoes in oil, drained and chopped
2 lb Pizza dough, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the cheese, salami, and tomatoes; toss.
3. Divide the dough into 6 pieces. On a floured surface, with a floured rolling pin, roll each piece of dough into a 7-inch round.
4. Top one half of each round with the cheese mixture, dividing evenly. Moisten the edges with water and fold the right side of the dough over so the edges meet. Press the edges to seal; crimp. Place on a large baking sheet. Using scissors, make three 1/2-inch slits in the top of each.
5. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until well-browned. Cool briefly before serving.
